columns.name: TimeGenerated
columns.description: The timestamp (UTC) reflecting the time when the event was ingested

columns.name: id
columns.description: Unique identifier of the audit event

columns.name: createdAt
columns.description: Timestamp when the audit event was created

columns.name: event
columns.description: Name of the audit event

columns.name: category
columns.description: Category of the audit event

columns.name: logType
columns.description: Type of the log entry. Mapped from API's 'type' field to avoid reserved 'Type' column name.

columns.name: createdBy_email
columns.description: Email address of the user who triggered the event

columns.name: createdBy_id
columns.description: Unique identifier of the user who triggered the event

columns.name: createdBy_name
columns.description: Name of the user who triggered the event

columns.name: createdBy_type
columns.description: Type of the actor (user, service account, etc.)

columns.name: object_id
columns.description: Unique identifier of the object affected by the event

columns.name: object_name
columns.description: Name of the object affected by the event

columns.name: context_ip
columns.description: IP address from which the event originated

columns.name: context_team_id
columns.description: Unique identifier of the team context

columns.name: context_team_name
columns.description: Name of the team context

columns.name: context_team_type
columns.description: Type of the team

columns.name: context_organization_id
columns.description: Unique identifier of the organization

columns.name: context_organization_name
columns.description: Name of the organization

columns.name: context_organization_type
columns.description: Type of the organization

columns.name: details
columns.description: Additional event details in JSON format
